footer.description: AI Carbon-Resilience Management - Measuring and optimizing AI carbon footprint in enterprises.

hero.subtitle: ACRM helps enterprises track, assess, and optimize CO₂ emissions from AI usage — in real-time, with a scientific 4-layer architecture.

features.sectionSubtitle: Core tools to track AI carbon footprint and build ESG/MRV advisory drafts.
features.realtimeDesc: Calculates CO2 and energy consumption for every AI interaction, based on formula: CO2(g) = (tokens/1000) x E x CI.
features.regionalDesc: Supports 12 regions with distinct CI metrics - from Vietnam to Nordics.
features.resilienceDesc: 3 evaluation metrics: AI Carbon Exposure Index, AI Cost Shock Index, and AI Resilience Score.
features.duplicateDesc: Automatically identifies similar prompts asked previously, suggesting reuse to reduce carbon.
features.smartDesc: Alerts when large models are used for simple tasks, suggesting smaller models and estimated CO2 savings.
features.advisorDesc: Generates advisory draft sections and Q&A guidance for GHG/MRV reporting with explicit assumptions and data gaps.

architecture.sectionSubtitle: Closed-loop data flow from collection to governance reporting.
architecture.layer1Desc: Collects AI metadata: token count, model type, processing time.
architecture.layer2Desc: Calculates energy & CO₂ based on V2 formula (Model-specific J/token).
architecture.layer3Desc: Smart Routing suggests optimal models & Green Hours scheduling.
architecture.layer4Desc: Evaluates 3 Resilience indexes for enterprise risk governance.

formula.sectionSubtitle: ACRM uses V2 model-specific energy as default. V1 is retained as a class-based fallback derived from the same J/token scale for consistency.

cta.title: Ready for the Green AI era?
cta.subtitle: Experience the smart chatbot integrated with emission tracking. Completely free for research and non-commercial use.

chat.emptySubtitle: Send a message and see the real-time carbon footprint of every AI response.

sessionHistory.title: Session History
sessionHistory.empty: No saved sessions yet. Save your current session to see it here.

advisor.title: ESG/MRV Advisor
advisor.subtitle: Advisory drafting support from your carbon session data. Output is view and copy only.
advisor.disclaimer: Advisory support only. Not legal advice, not assurance opinion, and not a certified final report.
advisor.noDataMessage: Send a few messages in chat first so Advisor can build a draft from real usage data.

help.reportingEntity: Enter the legal entity or business unit covered by this report, for example: ABC Technology JSC.
help.periodStart: Enter the reporting period start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
help.periodEnd: Enter the reporting period end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
help.organizationalBoundary: Define the organizational boundary: parent company, subsidiaries, branches, or joint ventures included.
help.operationalBoundary: Define the operational boundary: included operations and emission sources, such as AI runtime and related infrastructure.
help.methodologyStandard: Specify the reporting methodology standard, for example: GHG Protocol or ISO 14064-1.
help.inventoryApproach: Choose the Scope 2 inventory approach: location-based or market-based.
help.dataQuality: Rate the reliability of input data: High, Medium, or Low.
help.baseYear: Optional baseline year used to compare emissions trends across periods. Leave blank if unavailable.
help.ownerReviewer: Enter the report owner or internal reviewer responsible for this draft.

advisor.draftEmpty: Generate draft to see sectioned ESG/MRV advisory output.
advisor.qaEmpty: Generate draft first, then ask follow-up questions here.
advisor.qaHint: Ask anything about MRV structure, assumptions, gaps, and next actions.
advisor.qaPlaceholder: Ask follow-up based on this advisory draft...

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.subtitle: In-depth analysis of carbon, energy, and AI performance in the current session.
analytics.noDataMessage: Send some messages in Chat to see analysis here.
analytics.scoreCostShockDesc: Risk of reliance on large & expensive models

compare.title: Compare Models
compare.subtitle: Send the same prompt to 2-3 models, compare response, tokens, CO2, and energy side-by-side.

team.subtitle: A five-member team passionate about technology and sustainability, building practical solutions to measure AI carbon footprint.
